free_text: Compound nucleus effects in deuteron reaction:
10B(d,p)11B and 10B(d,alpha)8Be
The targets were prepared by
evaporating boron metal (enriched to 96% 10B) onto
2-mil tantalum foils. These targets were about 10 keV
thick to 2 MeV deuterons.
For normalization three targets were used:
a thick B2O3 target prepared from natural boron, a
pressed boron metal target (96% B10), and a thick,
isotopically pure B10 target.
Normalization error
Monitor error
